verdict.note: A smooth chat experience directly supports sustained back-and-forth messaging (the 7-day core-value metric), though current AC are too vague to prove the link.
Safety supports trust/retention but is indirect to the '7-day back-and-forth messaging' metric; it is a should-have enabler, not the core driver.
MAU is a reach/scale metric; legitimate business goal but only indirectly tied to the sustained-real-connection core value (a vanity-adjacent count).
Closest goal to core value; match creation is the first step toward sustained connection, directly on the north-star path.
Revenue/break-even is a sustainability goal, not a connection-quality goal; legitimate but tangential to the core value.

Story optimizes discovery ranking toward more matches/week (BRD-G2), not directly the >=7-day retained-connection north-star. One AC captures 'match converted to sustained messaging' as a training signal, nodding at the north-star, but the primary value is match volume. Weak alignment, deferred (could/later); consistent with parent PRD/epic.

Inherits PRD-AIREC stance: serves match-rate goal while guarding against north-star drift (explicitly 'without pulling away from the retained-connection north-star'). Peripheral and deferred, consistent with parent PRD.

Serves BRD-G2 (match rate), not the retained-connection north-star (>=7-day mutual messaging). PRD author explicitly flags the drift risk (optimizing for matches can pull away from durable connection) and mitigates by deferring (could/later) and targeting match->sustained-messaging conversion. Weak (peripheral, deliberately deferred), not off.
Reliable realtime send/receive is the literal mechanism of sustained conversation; 'so that we keep a real conversation instead of stopping at a match'.
Match-gating protects the 'real connection' promise (safe space, no stranger spam) which underpins sustained trust-based messaging.
Epic turns each match into a real conversation channel feeding the 7-day north-star; mau-monthly -> BRD-G1 traced.
PRD-CHAT directly realizes the north-star: it is the surface where matched couples message back and forth (7+ days). Prose names the metric explicitly and rejects 'match ao' (fake match).
Directly serves north-star (couples messaging back-and-forth 7+ days). PRD explicitly frames chat as where the core value happens.

Concert organization and ticketing is an entertainment-events business (artist ops, ticket sales, crowd safety) that does not measure couples sustaining messaging >=7 days. This is solution-first drift more severe than meetup seat-holding, as the story prose itself states. Verdict off; correctly held scope:out/could/later pending explicit PO weigh-against-north-star.

verdict.rationale: Epic kế thừa định hướng offline-events của PRD-EVENTS; mục tiêu là thử ý tưởng cộng đồng offline, không phục vụ trực tiếp north-star nhắn-tin-duy-trì. Scope:out/could/later nhất quán; off là đúng và đã được khoanh vùng.

verdict.note: Core value is sustained real connection measured by couples exchanging messages >=7 days/month. Offline events measure attendance, not sustained messaging; the PRD's only metric (mau-monthly) is explicitly an indirect proxy. The PRD itself self-flags this as solution-first/gold-plating and parks it scope:out/could/later. Off-core, but honestly surfaced and parked, not silently drifting.

verdict.rationale: North-star là số cặp đôi duy trì nhắn tin >=7 ngày; sự kiện offline đo bằng lượt tham dự (mau-monthly gián tiếp), không đo kết nối thật. PRD tự ghi nhận điều này và đặt scope:out/could/later đúng — drift là chủ ý, không phải lỗi, nhưng alignment với core-value vẫn là off.

verdict.note: Discovery+swipe+match is on the direct path to a sustained conversation.
Optimizes suggestion quality toward real matches (dormant-profile filtering, hard-criteria match, measured match-lift) — feeds the sustained-real-connection north-star, not a detour.
Recommendation quality is intended to drive real matches/connections; intent aligns with core value even though the AC quality is poor.
Frames matching as the foundation for real connection; consistent with core value.
Explicitly frames discovery/swipe/match as the first step toward a sustained real conversation per the north-star.
Premium gate on see-who-liked-you; the relike-creates-match AC touches the connection core but the story's primary driver is conversion, not retained messaging.
Boost raises visibility (ARPU driver); only indirectly linked to retained real connection.
Revenue epic; serves break-even (BRD-G3), only indirectly tied to retained-connection north-star.

Core value = retained real connection (7+ day messaging). Premium is the revenue layer (horizon:later) that funds the core; prose itself acknowledges it does not drive north-star and must not erode free core. Supports indirectly, not aligned directly. Not off.
verified badge raises match quality -> sustained messaging
removing fraud/catfish protects the real-connection promise
verification badge + report tooling underpins real-connection trust
trust/verification is a direct enabler of sustained real connection
core_value field is the authoritative source; one-liner restates 'real connection not fake match'.
Directly states success measured by sustained real conversations, not match count — mirrors core_value verbatim in intent.
Goal is measurable (100k MAU, 1-year horizon) with metric mau-monthly bound.
Measurable (20% of active users create >=1 match/week) with weekly-match-rate metric.
Measurable via premium-conversion-rate + arpu, year-2 break-even target.

Strong INVEST: persona-anchored user story, size L, 4 Given/When/Then AC each independently testable — ranked ordering with concrete 20-profile threshold, cold-start empty-state guard, signal capture, and a 2s/20-profile perf bound on common VN devices. Independent, Valuable, Estimable, Testable.

Epic mirrors PRD scope cleanly: goal, business context (PRD+BRD links), success criteria, in/out scope. Single open risk (insufficient interaction data) with measurable-improvement mitigation. Coherent, estimable, testable.

PRD is well-scoped: clear problem framing, honest me-too positioning, MoSCoW with explicit empty Must/Should and concrete Could items, NFR addresses cold-start fallback. Negotiable/Valuable/Estimable/Small/Testable all met at PRD altitude.

Full INVEST: independent, negotiable, valuable (sustains conversation), estimable (size M), small, testable. AC are Given/When/Then with hard thresholds (2s deliver, 1s sent-status, offline requeue, last-50 ordering).
Match-gating story; AC cover happy path, unmatched-reject (server-side, nothing stored), and unmatch-closes-thread-in-5s. Testable, small (size S).
Epic goal + success criteria are concrete and independently verifiable (match-gated chat; unmatched cannot message).
PRD scope is crisp: 1-1 chat gated by match status, realtime text + delivery/read state, retry queue. Valuable, testable, sized via child stories.

PRD-level: clear problem (match without chat = fake match), personas mapped to needs, MoSCoW partitioned, NFRs (VN mobile latency, multi-session sync), metric->goal traceable. Negotiable/Valuable/Estimable hold at PRD altitude.

verdict.rationale: Independent (đọc danh sách độc lập với giữ chỗ), Negotiable, Valuable (trong phạm vi events), Estimable (size M), Small, Testable — AC định lượng: bán kính 50km, sắp xếp theo ngày, empty-state có CTA mở rộng bán kính, tải <3s trên 4G. Đủ INVEST.
AC đối xứng giữ-chỗ/huỷ-chỗ với bất biến số chỗ rõ ràng (giảm 1 / tăng đúng 1), trạng thái hết-chỗ vô hiệu nút, xác nhận <2s. Testable, Small, Estimable (M). Đủ INVEST.

verdict.note: Independent, Testable (5 concrete observable AC: 4-ticket max, 10-min hold, e-ticket+QR, 24h reminder, sold-out disable, city/genre filter), Estimable (size L). Fails Small (L, spans discovery, ticketing, hold logic, QR, reminders, filters) and Valuable is weak against the product north-star (concert ticketing is an entertainment-events line, not sustained-messaging connection). Story is craft-sound but oversized and off-core.

PRD scope is well-bounded (Must/Should empty, explicit Won't-this-round list, single indirect metric) and the value proposition is honestly hedged. INVEST as a PRD-level container is coherent and estimable, but Valuable is weak: it is self-declared scope:out/could/later and its only metric (mau-monthly) is acknowledged as an indirect proxy that does not measure the north-star. Negotiable and small-enough only because nothing is committed this round.
Strong INVEST: testable, valuable, sized M; AC is concrete and verifiable (>=10 profiles, <300ms swipe, <5s match notice, explicit empty-state).

Well-formed INVEST story: 5 testable, quantified AC (p95 latency, 3/4 hard-criteria match, 30% active-user floor, +20% match-lift A/B p<0.05, explainability affordance). Independent, valuable, estimable at size L.

Fails the Testable in INVEST: AC 'hệ thống ghép đôi nhanh và chính xác' and 'người dùng cảm thấy gợi ý phù hợp' are subjective, unmeasurable, and unverifiable. Needs quantified criteria (latency target, a measurable relevance/acceptance signal).
Epic has clear goal, business-context links (PRD-MATCH, BRD-G2), success criteria tied to weekly-match-rate, and explicit in/out scope.
PRD has overview, personas, flows, full MoSCoW, NFRs, and metric-to-goal mapping; well-formed and independent.
S1 see-who-liked-you: 4 Given/When/Then AC, testable, sized M; instant-match-on-relike AC loops back to the connection core.
S2 timed boost: concrete AC (exactly 30 min, countdown, post-summary, non-paid block); independent, testable, sized M.
PRD-PREMIUM-E1: scope in/out crisp, success criteria measurable (conversion + ARPU), independent and small enough.
PRD-PREMIUM: MoSCoW well-sorted, honest me-too competitive framing, metrics tie cleanly to BRD-G3. Negotiable/Valuable/Testable hold at PRD level.
4 Given/When/Then AC, concrete thresholds (60s, >=90%, 3/24h, ID delete 24h); I/N/V/E(M)/S/T all hold
4 concrete AC (3s confirm, 10s queue, 5-report threshold, 24h dedup); I/N/V/E(S)/S/T all hold
epic goal/context/success-criteria/scope in+out all present
PRD-level; MoSCoW/NFR/metrics->BRD all present and crisp
Thin-labels-only doc; DRY (core_value lives in frontmatter, body deliberately blank). Personas and one-liner consistent with vision.
Vision narrative is coherent; problem, 3 distinct personas, value-prop and north-star all present and mutually consistent.
Independent/Small/Estimable OK, but not Testable: AC use 'mượt mà', 'nhanh', 'không giật lag' with no measurable threshold (latency/fps). Title and AC restate each other.

Not Small (safety spans a large surface) and not Testable: 'an toàn tuyệt đối' / 'bảo vệ hoàn toàn' are absolutes that cannot be verified. Needs concrete behaviors (block/report/filter) and bounded scope.
Quantified target and timeframe; not vague.
Specific percentage and cadence.
'Operational break-even by year 2' is a concrete financial milestone.
AC are numeric and observable (>=20 profiles, <20 profiles, within 2 seconds, never-empty discovery). No untestable 'fast/relevant/smart' language; thresholds pinned.
Success criteria are measurable (weekly match rate vs distance-only baseline; default ordering when data insufficient). Scope boundaries explicit. No vague verbs.

Concrete: discovery-ranking by model score vs distance-only, signal capture for training, sane default ordering for cold-start. Quantifiable success via weekly-match-rate->BRD-G2. No hand-wavy 'smart/AI-powered' filler left unscoped.
Every AC carries a measurable threshold; no weasel words.
AC are binary/measurable (reject, nothing stored, close within 5s).
AC are unfalsifiable adjectives ('phải mượt mà', 'hiển thị nhanh'). No concrete success measure; AC echo the story title.
'an toàn tuyệt đối', 'hành vi xấu', 'bảo vệ người dùng hoàn toàn' are undefined absolutes (gold-plating). No concrete trigger or system response specified.
Goal/scope unambiguous; in/out scope enumerated explicitly.
Requirements concrete. Only the NFR 'low latency on common VN mobile networks' lacks a number, acceptable at PRD altitude since S1 AC pins 2s/1s.
Concrete scope and requirements; only NFR latency is qualitative ('low latency') which is acceptable at PRD level since stories carry the numeric thresholds.

verdict.rationale: Không có từ mơ hồ (should/fast/intuitive); mọi tiêu chí đều định lượng (50km, 3 giây, 4G, empty-state cụ thể).
Không có thuật ngữ mơ hồ; bất biến số chỗ và ngưỡng thời gian (2 giây) đều cụ thể, kiểm thử được.

verdict.note: Acceptance criteria are specific and measurable (max 4 tickets, 10-minute temporary hold, electronic ticket with QR check-in, 24h reminder, sold-out label + disabled button, filter by city and genre pop/indie/EDM/nhac-tre). No hand-wavy 'fast/easy/intuitive' language; each AC is observable.

Low vagueness. MoSCoW buckets are explicit (incl. an empty-with-reason Must), Won't-this-round is enumerated, the gold-plating/solution-first risk is named in prose with concrete rationale, and the metric-to-goal mapping flags its own indirectness. Nothing material left to interpretation.
Every AC carries a measurable threshold or observable behavior; not vague.
Not vague: every AC is measurable with explicit thresholds and statistical criteria; no weasel words.
Both AC are hand-wavy adjectives ('fast and accurate', 'feels suitable') with no threshold; cannot be tested or signed off as written.
Scope boundaries are explicit (messaging, identity-verify, AI-rec out of scope).
Concrete flows and explicit Won't-this-round scope (AI rec deferred to PRD-AIREC).
AC concrete: blurred-count for non-paid, full sorted list for paid, unlock within 5s, instant match on relike.
AC concrete: exact 30-min window, countdown + view-count display, post-boost summary, non-paid block.
Goal and success criteria concrete; no weasel terms.
Quantified where it counts (boost 30 min, sync immediate); payment-gateway deferral named explicitly as build-team choice, not vague hand-wave.
all AC quantified and testable
thresholds and dedup window explicit
scope boundaries explicit, success criteria measurable
concrete flows: liveness selfie vs ID, report->moderation queue
Labels are crisp and specific; no hand-wavy prose.
Concrete framing (real-connection vs vanity-match); north-star quantified (7+ day back-and-forth chats).
